en-AU.title: CulturePass - Diaspora Events
en-AU.subtitle: Events & Groups near you
en-AU.description: CulturePass is your cultural lifestyle platform. Discover events, join diaspora communities, find local businesses, and celebrate diversity across Australia, New Zealand, UAE, UK & Canada. Connect with your heritage, find food from back home, and meet people who share your roots.
